Legend Leaders Community Events Gallery About தமிழ் / EN
Sign In
Join the Legend Fans Association
வாழ்க லெஜண்ட் ரசிகர்களே

Become a Legend Fan.

Register with the All World Legend Fans Association. Choose your leader, get your verified Fan ID, and join Tamil Nadu's most authentic Legend Saravanan fan community.

— Section 01 —

Your contact

We'll verify your mobile number. Email is optional but recommended for important communications.

+91
A 6-digit code will be sent via SMS
— Section 02 —

Verify your number

Enter the 6-digit code sent to +91 98•••••210. Edit number

Didn't get the code? Resend in 0:23
— Section 03 —

Create your MPIN

A 4-digit PIN for secure login. Avoid simple patterns (0000, 1234, repeating digits).

— Section 04 —

Your identity

Personal details for your Fan ID card.

📷

Upload your photo for Fan ID

This photo appears on your digital Fan ID card. Use a clear face photo (passport-style works best).

— Section 05 —

Your address

Required for distributing merchandise to you when admin/leader selects you.

— Section 06 —

Choose your leader *

Register under one of our association leaders. They'll be your primary contact for events and distributions in your area.
